posts.author: TechWatchdog_UK
posts.text: I'm absolutely fuming at how @PublicSquare handles these reports. You lot are terrified of a single angry tweet from a critic, yet you ignore the blatant bias in your own algorithms. This isn't moderation, it's censorship by people who think 'corporate' is an excuse to silence anyone who questions them. #DigitalRights #FreeSpeech #TechWatch
posts.explanation: This post expresses political criticism and frustration with a platform's moderation policies but does not direct harm, make threats, or promote illegal content.

posts.author: Sarah_Jenkins_UK
posts.text: I've been seeing this ridiculous claim circulating again that 'LumaWell' has developed a miracle cure for breast cancer using just lemon juice and salt water enemas. It's absolutely dangerous nonsense. I'm writing to correct the record: there is NO scientific evidence for this, and the only proven treatments are chemotherapy and radiotherapy. Please do not follow anyone telling you to stop your treatment for this. #BreastCancerSupport
posts.explanation: The post is approved because the author explicitly corrects a harmful misinformation claim rather than promoting it.

posts.author: SarahJ_Events
posts.text: Just spotted this exclusive charity auction listing on CommunityFeed! 🎨 Supporting local Bristol relief efforts with some stunning art pieces. All proceeds go straight to the verified official charity account. History is spot on and seller has been active for years. #CharityAuction #BristolArt #CommunitySupport
posts.explanation: This post promotes an established, verified charitable organisation with consistent history and no signs of deception.
posts.bio: Official fictional charity and community relief account.

posts.author: SarahJ_Leeds
posts.text: @GamerBoy89 has been relentlessly harassing me with vile personal insults and threats about my family. It's completely unacceptable behaviour.
posts.explanation: This post clearly promotes a targeted harassment attack, which violates policy and must be removed.

posts.author: SarahK_WebSec
posts.text: Hi everyone, just a quick reminder that our team is running a mandatory security update today. Please click this link to verify your identity and provide your login password and 2FA code so we can process your claim immediately. Thanks! #SecurityUpdate #Important
posts.explanation: This post explicitly requests sensitive credentials, which is an obvious fraud violation that requires removal.

posts.author: RadiantReset_74
posts.text: You need to hear this! @RadiantReset is finally revealing the truth they've been hiding from doctors for years. They say chemo and radiation are just poisoning you further, causing more harm than good. Their unproven 'cellular regeneration' protocol actually heals your body naturally without any toxic side effects. It's a complete revolution in cancer treatment! Don't let them scare you away from this life-changing cure. #Cancer #Wellness
posts.explanation: This post promotes abandoning standard medical treatments for an unproven protocol, which constitutes harmful health misinformation.

posts.author: DisciplineQueen_X
posts.text: The only way to true freedom is through total starvation. Your body needs to feel nothing before it can be reborn. Stop feeding your weakness and start training your soul. #Transformation #Discipline
posts.explanation: This post glamorises eating-disorder behaviour by encouraging starvation as a path to 'freedom' without any indication of personal crisis.

posts.author: Jax_Storm94
posts.text: You need to hear this! @RadiantReset is finally revealing the truth they've been hiding from doctors for years. They say chemo and radiation are just poisoning you further, causing more harm than good. Their unproven 'ce
posts.explanation: This post promotes dangerous medical misinformation by instructing users to abandon standard cancer treatments in favour of unverified protocols.

posts.author: JadedObserver_24
posts.text: I've had enough of @KaelenV's constant insults and threats. He's been harassing me for weeks, but now he's explicitly said he'll meet me at Westbridge Station tomorrow at 4pm to 'settle things'. This isn't just a complaint anymore; it's a direct threat of violence.
posts.explanation: This post requires Escalation due to the credible threat of planned violence with a specific time and location, alongside ongoing harassment.

posts.author: WatcherInTheWoods_73
posts.text: People keep messaging me about how @SilentSage is 'too much' for this town to handle, but honestly it's just a bunch of people trying to get me to leave. They're coordinating their attacks and now they're asking if I'll come down to the old market square tomorrow so we can discuss my departure. It's getting ridiculous. #CommunityWatch
posts.explanation: This is a coordinated harassment campaign involving ambiguous threats to meet the target.

posts.author: VintageTech_Liverpool_24
posts.text: Urgent! The verified vintage seller account has just contacted me directly regarding a special preorder they're handling for a private collector. They insist I must send my prepaid card details immediately to secure the transaction before their system locks out, as this is a high-priority exclusive deal. Please do not delay on this critical payment instruction.
posts.explanation: This post suggests a compromised account making an urgent request for sensitive financial information under false pretenses of a special deal.
